756461883.label: PL1500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0000
756461883.transcript: My fists will find a way!

758403931.label: PL1500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2800
758403931.transcript: Warriors, do not speak with words.

845762874.label: PL1500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1400
845762874.transcript: The Eternal Raid style at your service.

851121336.label: PL1500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1200
851121336.transcript: Ha! It takes strength to wield a weapon like that!

884136100.label: PL1500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2200
884136100.transcript: What say you to testing them yourself?

928293431.label: PL1500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2400
928293431.transcript: Ho, ho, ho. You got talent with the spear there, big man.

995119558.label: PL1500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0200
995119558.transcript: My knuckles will beat out a path!

1017115962.label: PL1500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2900
1017115962.transcript: With my body, I shall hold up the skies.

1017351529.label: PL1500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2500
1017351529.transcript: They fear the fury of my knuckles!

1018092989.label: PL1500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1900
1018092989.transcript: Become my disciple and unlock these wonders for yourself.

1052466081.label: PL1500_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2700
1052466081.transcript: Like two mighty winds, we formed a hurricane!

1068181062.label: PL1500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2700
1068181062.transcript: Why wield a weapon when you can become a weapon?

1068851584.label: PL1500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2800
1068851584.transcript: Your explosive power might even surpass my fists!

1072386050.label: PL1500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1600
1072386050.transcript: Unite your spear with fists, and together they shall perform a concert of ruin!

247608351.label: PL1500_vo_CMM_emo_pushup_1
247608351.transcript: Let us begin. One, two, three, four, five, six, seven, eight, nine. Feel the burn.

340051636.label: PL1500_vo_CMM_emo_abs_1
340051636.transcript: I shall punish this body! Glorious!

373337607.label: PL1500_vo_CMM_emo_squat_1
373337607.transcript: One, two, three, four, five, six, seven, eight, nine.

500802144.label: PL1500_vo_CMM_emo_squat_3
500802144.transcript: Ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha.

770099235.label: PL1500_vo_CMM_emo_abs_2
770099235.transcript: Remove all doubt. One, two, three, four, five, six, seven, eight, nine. Farewell, weakness.

113926304.label: PL1500_vo_CMM_emo_boxing_1
113926304.transcript: Ready yourself. My fist bows to no one!

233041741.label: PL1500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2100
233041741.transcript: The way of the fist is a path unerring.

600472623.label: PL1500_vo_CMM_emo_boxing_2
600472623.transcript: Focus. Master. Rage. And become immortal!

562868255.label: PL1500_vo_CMM_emo_onigiri_1
562868255.transcript: Sweet carbohydrates. Little bit of you, little bit of you. Delicious!
